items.summary: Update the Footer component to display the real clinic contact information: clinic name 'treatVET', full address (Tulatali, in front of Padua High School, Padua - 4397, Lohagara, Chittagong), 24/7 availability note, and the emergency house-visit highlight.

Add 'Birds / Poultry' as a fourth animal category throughout the entire application. Sub-types for this category should include: Layer, Broiler, and Color Bird. Update the backend animal category variant to include a Birds/Poultry option. Update all frontend filter controls, appointment booking form dropdowns, service cards, treatment sections, and vaccination sections to include Birds / Poultry as a selectable category.

Add the following new service types and seed entries to the backend and surface them on the Services page: (1) Post-Mortem & Poultry Diagnosis — available for the Birds/Poultry category, available more than 15 hours per day, covering layer, broiler, and color birds; (2) Ration Formulation Consultation — consultation service covering all animal categories for feed/ration planning; (3) Animal Housing Planning — consultation service covering all animal categories for housing design and planning. Ensure these services appear in the Services page grid and are selectable in the appointment booking form.

Update the Navigation bar logo and brand name to display 'treatVET' with the subtitle 'Veterinary Care Treatment'. Update the browser tab title (index.html or equivalent) to 'treatVET – Veterinary Care Treatment'.

Generate and display a series of four animal hero/banner images for the homepage animal category cards in this order: (1) Pets (dogs, cats), (2) Large Animals (cattle, buffalo, camel), (3) Small Animals (sheep, goats), (4) Birds/Poultry (layer hens, broiler chickens, color birds). Render them as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated.

Update the homepage hero and About Us section with the real clinic details: clinic name 'treatVET (Veterinary Care Treatment)', operating 24/7, 4+ veterinary experts, 1700+ animals treated, 82% client satisfaction, operating since 2017. Display the full address: treatVET, Tulatali (in front of Padua High School), Padua - 4397, Lohagara, Chittagong. Highlight the emergency house-visit service ('In emergency cases, we visit the animal owner's house at any time') and the availability of a standby veterinary specialist.
